miscTables.descr: Account
pivot
Ledger Group
Company Code
LC2 Amt - Display
I:K,Q:S
S
Co,Ledger,Crcy,Flex6,PK,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Txt,PC,CC,TP,BusCat,TTY,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3
Co,Ledger,Crcy,Doc Nbr,PK,GL,GLdesc,Doc Amt - Display,LC Amt - Display,LC2 Amt - Display,Text,PC,CC,TP,BusCat,TTY,Doc Amt,LC Amt,LC2 Amt
Ledger,Co,Crcy,GL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set Amt2 = 0, Amt3 = 0, Amt4 = 0, CC = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Amt2 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, Flex6, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.Flex6 = f2.Flex6 and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1

update TransX set Amt3 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, Flex6, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.Flex6 = f2.Flex6 and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1

update TransX set Amt4 = f2.Amt1 from TransX f1 inner join (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, Crcy, GL, PC, Flex6, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US') f2 on f1.KeyID = f2.KeyID and f1.Co = f2.Co and f1.Crcy = f2.Crcy and f1.GL = f2.GL and f1.PC = f2.PC and f1.Flex6 = f2.Flex6 and f1.Amt1 = f2.Amt1
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z003' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' and Amt1 = Amt3 and Amt1 = Amt4
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and Amt1 = Amt2 and Amt1 = Amt4
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' and Amt1 = Amt2 and Amt1 = Amt3
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z004' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' and Amt1 = Amt3
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and Amt1 = Amt2

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex6, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Amt1) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Flex6, t.Co, '6915000' as GL, t.Crcy, '' as PC, DefaultCC, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1 from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '9910000' and not PC = '' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex6, t.Co, t.Crcy, DefaultCC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex6, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Amt1) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Flex6, Co, '4397001' as GL, Crcy, PC, CC, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4398600' and not PC = '' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex6, Co, Crcy, PC, CC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex6, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Amt1, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Flex6, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex6, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (PK is NULL or Amt1 = 0)
update TransX set PK = '40' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 > 0
update TransX set Amt2 = 0, Amt3 = 0, Amt4 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '00'
update TransX set Amt2 = Amt1, Amt1 = 0, Amt3 = 0, Amt4 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '10'
update TransX set Amt3 = Amt1, Amt1 = 0, Amt2 = 0, Amt4 = 0 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '30'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PK)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex6 is NULL
update TransX set Txt = 'Bal Acct W/O', Flex6 = '', TP = '', BusCat = '', TTY = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = cast(ABS(Amt1) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = cast(ABS(Amt2) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = cast(ABS(Amt3) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
